English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Armstrong, Furst & Tilton records
Armstrong, Furst & Tilton, Architects (Chicago, Ill.)
2243
130 items. 130 items.
[ca.1927-1955] -1927-1950 (bulk) Blueprints, drawings, photographs, and printed material. Material of this firm and its successor, Furst & Tilton (after 1950) of Chicago, Illinois. Many items relate to the Seabury-Western Theological Seminary at Evanston, Illinois; others pertain to churches, mainly in Wisconsin and Illinois; also schools, public buildings, business establishments and residences. Collection material in English 3921002
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Julia Guarneri Aug. 2002
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Blueprints, drawings, photographs, pamphlets, and printed material of this firm and its successor, Furst & Tilton (after 1950) of Chicago, Illinois. Many items relate to the Seabury-Western Theological Seminary at Evanston, Illinois; others pertain to churches, mainly in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, and cities in Illinois; also schools, public buildings, business establishments and residences.
SEPARATED MATERIAL
Paper: Brief History of St. John's Church - Ithaca, N.Y., 1822-1955, A.G. Whitcomb. See Acc. #2308.
Catalogue: "Ecclesiastical Appointments of Distinction." Morhouse-Gorham Co., Chicago, Ill. For Pamphlet Collection.
Cite As:
Armstrong, Furst & Tilton records, #2243. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Blueprints. Architects. Architecture -- Wisconsin -- Milwaukee. Architecture -- Illinois -- Chicago. Architecture -- Illinois -- Evanston. Seabury-Western Theological Seminary Furst & Tilton, Architects (Chicago, Ill.)

Scope and Contents
Gives history of church. Tilton chosen, 1924, as architect. Completed 1926. See also #2259.Photos of Drawings: Emmanuel Church, La Grange, Ill.22Drawings: Cross24Photo of Drawing: Capitol Drive Church, Milwaukee, WTS.11Photos of Drawings: Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee195511Photo of Sketch: Details of Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee, WisconsinApril 30, 194511Two Photos of Sketch: Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee, WisconsinUndated11Leaflet: Lenten Invitation, Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee, WisconsinUndated11Photo of Sketch: Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee, Wisconsin194511Photo of Sketch: Capitol Drive Lutheran Church, Milwaukee, WisconsinUndated11Magazine: Capitol Drive Chronicle1954-195612

Scope and Contents
Two are 14" x 9" and one is 8" x 5".E.
